title: Upgrade or migrate Ledger storage safely
preconditions: The Ledger is readable by one writer; the source version is recognized; a permitted backup location exists; the target migration path is supported.
postconditions: The active Ledger is either a fully validated candidate with complete Durable Ledger State equivalence under the declared transformation or the unchanged source; a verified recovery artifact exists and no partial migration is active.
main_flow: 1. The agent supplies an Idempotency Identity and requests an upgrade/migration preflight. 2. Tally validates source integrity, source/target compatibility, permissions, available space, and required key material. 3. Tally creates and independently verifies a complete Durable Ledger State recovery point. 4. Tally transforms an isolated candidate while the source remains authoritative. 5. Tally compares target version, every durable entity/history type, idempotency outcome, per-type count, relationship/cardinality rule, integrity result, and exact derived total against the source and declared migration outcome. 6. Only after successful validation and explicit authorization does Tally atomically activate the candidate. 7. Tally retains and reports the recovery point and completed version transition.
alt_flows: 2a. Source is corrupt, target unsupported, permissions unsafe, space insufficient, or key material unavailable -> stop before transformation
3a. Complete-state backup creation or independent verification fails -> stop and keep the source authoritative
4a. Transformation is interrupted or fails -> discard or isolate the candidate and keep the source authoritative

5a. Any Durable Ledger State type, idempotency outcome, per-type count, relationship rule, integrity result, exact derived total, or version differs from the declared migration outcome -> reject the candidate
6a. Activation was not explicitly authorized -> leave the validated candidate inactive
7a. Post-activation complete-state validation fails -> invoke verified recovery and report a stable migration failure
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"A compatible Tally upgrade requires a storage format/schema change, or the owner initiates a supported storage-provider migration.","status":"draft"}
